revision.comment: [[TM:Image template notice1]] merged into [[TM:File template notice]]
1 revision imported: mass importing from wikipedia

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Other category-header templates]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects O]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects O]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects O]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Other category-header templates]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects O]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects O
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
